issues.description: Trigger value 'Trigger' is invalid. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn
KO action requires a valid condition to determine when it activates. Raw 'Trigger' without specificity cannot execute a KO effect. Need proper trigger event (e.g., OnPlay, OnAttack, etc.)
